title: TaxBuddy Marketing Site

how_it_works_scrolly.title: TaxBuddy - How it Works Scrollytelling
how_it_works_scrolly.note: Scroll-driven pinned split-column redesign of the #how-it-works section. Static thumbnail only shows one scroll frame (step 3 preview) — the scroll interaction is in the HTML/needs code wiring when ported into public/landing.html.

_design_md_upload.note: DESIGN.md upload artifact used to build the design system — not a page.

_notes: IMPORTANT: generate_screen_from_text / edit_screens time out through the MCP client (Claude Code aborts the long request and the abort cancels the server-side job, so nothing commits). Drive them via direct curl instead: POST JSON-RPC {method:'tools/call', params:{name, arguments}} to https://stitch.googleapis.com/mcp with header 'X-Goog-Api-Key' and --max-time 420. Full-page generation ~60s, edits ~90-115s. The 'index' page was generated then extended with two edit_screens passes because a single long prompt gets condensed (Stitch dropped 8 of 11 sections on the first shot).
